phrases.example: I'm having a problem with the air conditioner.
It doesn't seem to work at all.

phrases.text: Could you send someone to check it?
phrases.example: Could you send someone to check it, please?
How long will it take for someone to come?

phrases.text: Just to confirm, they'll come at...
phrases.example: Just to confirm, they'll come at 3 p.m., right?
